title: Resi's horror pack
description:
a modpack i made for friends that people can try now!
cobbled together in a few minutes, dont expect it to be too spooky.
body:
this modpack was made for a friend so it was technically hers, and she gave the greenlight so here we are!
this modpack has horror elements and whatnot, if a mod i put in there instakills you, im sorgy!!
this modpack does have essentials so playing with friends is allowed!!
breaking news:
this idoit added gravestone mod so you dont have to. enjoy ! !
